15 tuojh] 2021 rd dh vof/k ;k u, izkf/kdj.k mRrj izns”k ds xBu] buesa ls tks Hkh igys gks] rd in/kkj.k djsaxs A**( ¼ ii½ mDr vf/klwpuk esa iSjk 6 ds i'pkr~] fuEufyf[kr iSjk dks var%LFkkfir fd;k tk,xk] vFkkZr~ ^^6d- iSjk 6 esa varfoZ’V fdlh ckr ds gksrs gq, Hkh] ,lbZ,lh mRrj izns”k] ds v/;{k vkSj lnL;] 15 tuojh] 2021 dh vof/k ;k ubZ ,lbZ,lh] mRrj izns”k ds xBu] buesa ls tks Hkh igys gks] rd in/kkj.k djsaxsA(** [ts&11013@43@2007&vkbZ,- II(I) ihVh-] lqthr dqekj cktis;h] la;qDr lfpo ewy vf/klwpuk] Hkkjr ds jkti=] vlk/kkj.k] Hkkx 2, [k.M 3] mi [k.M ¼ii½ la- dk-vk- 3338¼v½ rkjh[k 16 vDrwcj] 2017 }kjk izdkf”kr dh xbZ FkhA सं. 3590] नई ᳰद᭨ली, शुᮓवार, नव᭥बर 13, 2020/काᳶतᭅ क 22, 1942 No. 3590] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 13, 2020/KARTIKA 22, 1942 सी.जी.-डी.एल.-अ.-17112020-223102 CG-DL-E-17112020-223102 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th November 2020 S.O. 4087(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986) and in pursuance of the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.O. 1533(E), dated the 14th September, 2006, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 3338(E), dated the 16th October, 2017, namely:- (i) In the said notification, after paragraph 2, the following paragraph shall be inserted, namely: - “2A. Notwithstanding anything contained in paragraph 2, the Chairman and Members of the Authority, Uttar Pradesh shall hold office for a term up to the 15th January, 2021 or till the constitution of new Authority, Uttar Pradesh, whichever is earlier”. (ii) In the said notification, after paragraph 6, the following paragraph shall be inserted, namely: - “6 A. Notwithstanding anything contained in paragraph 6, the Chairman and Members of SEAC, Uttar Pradesh shall hold office for a term up to the 15th January, 2021 or till the constitution of new SEAC, Uttar Pradesh, whichever is earlier”. [J-11013/43/2007-IA.II(I) Pt.] SUJIT KUMAR BAJPAYEE, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 3338 (E), dated the 16th October, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
